mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN 'RUNNING' WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'IDLE' END AS engineStatus, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN '运行中' WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN '排队中' ELSE '空闲' END AS engineStatusText, COALESCE(MAX(a.ai_model_version), 'v3.2.1') AS engineVersion, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS runningInstanceCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status IN (0, 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS queueBacklogCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 2 AND COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) >= #{startOfDay} AND COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) < #{nowTime} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayAnalysisCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 2 AND a.analysis_start_time IS NOT NULL AND a.analysis_end_time IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) >= #{startOfDay} AND COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) < #{nowTime} THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MICROSECOND, a.analysis_start_time, a.analysis_end_time) / 1000000.0 ELSE NULL END), 2), 0) AS avgAnalysisSeconds, COALESCE(MAX(COALESCE(a.analysis_end_time, a.update_time, a.create_time)), #{nowTime}) AS lastHeartbeatTime, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN 'AI引擎任务执行正常' WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.analysis_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN 'AI引擎待处理队列存在积压' ELSE 'AI引擎空闲，暂无待处理任务' END AS statusMessage FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a WHERE a.is_deleted = 0

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAuditCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS passCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejectCount FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a LEFT JOIN ecg_diagnosis_report r ON r.report_id = ( SELECT rr.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report rr WHERE rr.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.report_create_time DESC, rr.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.analysis_status = 2 AND DATE(COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time)) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time)) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY statDate ASC

SELECT a.diagnosis_no AS diagnosisId, a.ai_diagnosis_id AS aiDiagnosisId, a.record_id AS ecgId, a.ecg_no AS ecgNo, a.patient_name AS patientName, a.gender AS gender, a.age AS age, a.inpatient_no AS inpatientNo, a.dept_id AS deptId, a.dept_name AS deptName, c.bed_no AS bedNo, a.ai_model_version AS aiVersion, COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) AS diagnosisTime, COALESCE(a.ai_conclusion, '') AS aiConclusion, COALESCE(NULLIF(a.abnormal_type, ''), '-') AS abnormalType, COALESCE(a.abnormal_count, 0) AS abnormalCount, COALESCE(a.abnormal_level, 0) AS abnormalLevel, COALESCE(a.confidence, 0) AS confidence, COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) AS reportStatus, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 1 THEN '待审核' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 2 THEN '审核通过' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 3 THEN '已驳回' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 4 THEN '已作废' ELSE '待审核' END AS reportStatusText, ws.warning_level AS warningLevel, CASE WHEN ws.warning_level = 1 THEN '低危' WHEN ws.warning_level = 2 THEN '中危' WHEN ws.warning_level = 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '正常' END AS warningLevelText FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a LEFT JOIN ecg_collection_record c ON c.record_id = a.record_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_diagnosis_report r ON r.report_id = ( SELECT rr.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report rr WHERE rr.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.report_create_time DESC, rr.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COALESCE(ww.ai_diagnosis_id, -1) AS ai_diagnosis_id_key, ww.record_id, MAX(ww.warning_level) AS warning_level FROM ecg_abnormal_warning ww WHERE ww.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY COALESCE(ww.ai_diagnosis_id, -1), ww.record_id ) ws ON ws.record_id = a.record_id AND ws.ai_diagnosis_id_key = COALESCE(a.ai_diagnosis_id, -1) WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND ( a.diagnosis_no = #{diagnosisId} OR CAST(a.ai_diagnosis_id AS CHAR) = #{diagnosisId} ) LIMIT 1

SELECT a.diagnosis_no AS diagnosisId, a.ai_diagnosis_id AS aiDiagnosisId, a.record_id AS ecgId, a.ecg_no AS ecgNo, a.patient_name AS patientName, a.gender AS gender, a.age AS age, a.inpatient_no AS inpatientNo, a.dept_id AS deptId, a.dept_name AS deptName, c.bed_no AS bedNo, a.ai_model_version AS aiVersion, COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) AS diagnosisTime, COALESCE(a.ai_conclusion, '') AS aiConclusion, COALESCE(NULLIF(a.abnormal_type, ''), '-') AS abnormalType, COALESCE(a.abnormal_count, 0) AS abnormalCount, COALESCE(a.abnormal_level, 0) AS abnormalLevel, COALESCE(a.confidence, 0) AS confidence, a.heart_rate AS heartRate, a.pr_interval AS prInterval, a.qrs_duration AS qrsDuration, a.qt_interval AS qtInterval, a.qtc_interval AS qtcInterval, r.report_id AS reportId, r.report_no AS reportNo, COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) AS reportStatus, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 1 THEN '待审核' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 2 THEN '审核通过' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 3 THEN '已驳回' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 4 THEN '已作废' ELSE '待审核' END AS reportStatusText, r.doctor_diagnosis AS doctorConclusion, r.doctor_suggestion AS doctorSuggestion, r.audit_doctor_name AS auditDoctorName, r.audit_time AS auditTime, r.audit_opinion AS auditOpinion FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a LEFT JOIN ecg_collection_record c ON c.record_id = a.record_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_diagnosis_report r ON r.report_id = ( SELECT rr.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report rr WHERE rr.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.report_create_time DESC, rr.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND ( a.diagnosis_no = #{diagnosisId} OR CAST(a.ai_diagnosis_id AS CHAR) = #{diagnosisId} ) LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS pendingAuditCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) IN (2, 3, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS auditedCount, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(a.confidence), 2), 0) AS avgConfidence FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a LEFT JOIN ecg_diagnosis_report r ON r.report_id = ( SELECT rr.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report rr WHERE rr.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.report_create_time DESC, rr.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.analysis_status = 2

SELECT a.diagnosis_no AS diagnosisId, a.record_id AS ecgId, a.ecg_no AS ecgNo, CONCAT( COALESCE(a.patient_name, ''), '/', COALESCE(a.age, 0), '岁/', COALESCE(a.gender, '未知') ) AS patientInfo, a.inpatient_no AS hospitalNo, a.dept_name AS deptName, a.ai_model_version AS aiVersion, COALESCE(NULLIF(a.ai_conclusion, ''), '-') AS aiConclusion, COALESCE(a.abnormal_count, 0) AS abnormalCount, COALESCE(a.confidence, 0) AS confidence, COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) AS diagnosisTime, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 1 THEN '待审核' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) IN (2, 3, 4) THEN '已审核' ELSE '待审核' END AS status FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a LEFT JOIN ecg_diagnosis_report r ON r.report_id = ( SELECT rr.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report rr WHERE rr.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.report_create_time DESC, rr.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.analysis_status = 2
AND a.ecg_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.ecgNo}, '%')
AND a.patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.patientName}, '%')
AND COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 1
AND COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) IN (2, 3, 4)
ORDER BY COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) DESC, a.ai_diagnosis_id DESC

SELECT a.diagnosis_no AS diagnosisId, a.ai_diagnosis_id AS aiDiagnosisId, a.record_id AS ecgId, a.ecg_no AS ecgNo,
a.patient_id AS patientId, a.patient_name AS patientName, a.gender AS gender, a.age AS age, a.inpatient_no AS hospitalNo, a.dept_name AS deptName,
a.ai_model_version AS aiVersion, COALESCE(a.diagnosis_time, a.analysis_end_time, a.analysis_start_time) AS diagnosisTime, a.analysis_start_time AS analysisStartTime, a.analysis_end_time AS analysisEndTime,
a.heart_rate AS heartRate, a.pr_interval AS prInterval, a.qrs_duration AS qrsDuration, a.qt_interval AS qtInterval, a.qtc_interval AS qtcInterval,
a.ai_conclusion AS aiConclusion, a.abnormal_type AS abnormalType, a.abnormal_count AS abnormalCount, a.confidence AS confidence,
c.lead_count AS leadCount, c.sampling_rate AS samplingRate, c.collection_start_time AS collectionStartTime, c.collection_end_time AS collectionEndTime, c.ecg_data_file_url AS rawDataFileUrl,
r.report_id AS reportId, r.report_no AS reportNo, r.report_status AS reportStatus, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) = 1 THEN '待审核' WHEN COALESCE(r.report_status, 1) IN (2, 3, 4) THEN '已审核' ELSE '待审核' END AS status, r.doctor_diagnosis AS doctorConclusion, r.doctor_suggestion AS doctorSuggestion, r.audit_doctor_id AS auditDoctorId, r.audit_doctor_name AS auditDoctorName, r.audit_time AS auditTime, r.audit_opinion AS auditOpinion FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a LEFT JOIN ecg_collection_record c ON c.record_id = a.record_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_diagnosis_report r ON r.report_id = ( SELECT rr.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report rr WHERE rr.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.report_create_time DESC, rr.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND ( a.diagnosis_no = #{diagnosisId} OR CAST(a.ai_diagnosis_id AS CHAR) = #{diagnosisId} ) LIMIT 1

SELECT c.record_id AS ecgId, c.ecg_no AS ecgNo, c.sampling_rate AS samplingRate, c.lead_count AS leadCount, c.ecg_data_file_url AS rawDataFileUrl, c.collection_start_time AS collectStartTime, c.collection_end_time AS collectEndTime FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.record_id = #{ecgId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.ai_diagnosis_id AS aiDiagnosisId, a.diagnosis_no AS diagnosisId, a.record_id AS ecgId, a.ecg_no AS ecgNo, a.patient_id AS patientId, a.patient_name AS patientName, a.gender AS gender, a.age AS age, a.inpatient_no AS hospitalNo, a.ai_conclusion AS aiConclusion, c.collection_start_time AS collectionTime, r.report_id AS reportId, r.report_no AS reportNo, r.report_status AS reportStatus FROM ecg_ai_diagnosis a LEFT JOIN ecg_collection_record c ON c.record_id = a.record_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_diagnosis_report r ON r.report_id = ( SELECT rr.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report rr WHERE rr.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.report_create_time DESC, rr.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND ( a.diagnosis_no = #{diagnosisId} OR CAST(a.ai_diagnosis_id AS CHAR) = #{diagnosisId} ) LIMIT 1
SELECT r.report_id FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.report_id <= #{maxAllowedId} ORDER BY r.report_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ecg_diagnosis_report ( report_id, report_no, record_id, ai_diagnosis_id, patient_id, patient_name, gender, age, inpatient_no, collection_time, ai_conclusion, doctor_diagnosis, doctor_suggestion, report_create_doctor_id, report_create_doctor_name, report_create_time, audit_doctor_id, audit_doctor_name, audit_time, audit_opinion, report_status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{reportId}, #{reportNo}, #{ecgId}, #{aiDiagnosisId}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{hospitalNo}, #{collectionTime}, #{aiConclusion}, #{doctorConclusion}, NULL, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{auditTime}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{auditTime}, #{auditOpinion}, #{reportStatus}, 0 )

INSERT INTO ecg_diagnosis_report ( report_id, report_no, record_id, ai_diagnosis_id, patient_id, patient_name, gender, age, inpatient_no, collection_time, ai_conclusion, doctor_diagnosis, doctor_suggestion, report_create_doctor_id, report_create_doctor_name, report_create_time, audit_doctor_id, audit_doctor_name, audit_time, audit_opinion, report_status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{reportId}, #{reportNo}, #{ecgId}, #{aiDiagnosisId}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{hospitalNo}, #{collectionTime}, #{aiConclusion}, #{doctorConclusion}, #{doctorSuggestion}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{reportCreateTime}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{auditTime}, #{auditOpinion}, #{reportStatus}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ecg_diagnosis_report SET doctor_diagnosis = #{doctorConclusion}, audit_doctor_id = #{auditDoctorId}, audit_doctor_name = #{auditDoctorName}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, report_status = #{reportStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ecg_diagnosis_report SET doctor_diagnosis = #{doctorConclusion}, doctor_suggestion = #{doctorSuggestion}, audit_doctor_id = #{auditDoctorId}, audit_doctor_name = #{auditDoctorName}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, report_status = #{reportStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE ecg_collection_record SET report_status = #{reportStatus}, display_status = #{displayStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{ecgId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ecg_ai_diagnosis SET is_abnormal = #{isAbnormal}, abnormal_level = #{abnormalLevel}, abnormal_type = #{abnormalType}, abnormal_count = #{abnormalCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE ai_diagnosis_id = #{aiDiagnosisId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ecg_abnormal_warning SET handle_status = #{handleStatus}, handle_user_id = #{handleUserId}, handle_user_name = #{handleUserName}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, handle_opinion = #{handleOpinion}, update_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND ( (#{aiDiagnosisId} IS NOT NULL AND ai_diagnosis_id = #{aiDiagnosisId}) OR (#{aiDiagnosisId} IS NULL AND #{recordId} IS NOT NULL AND record_id = #{recordId}) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_abnormal_warning WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND ( (#{aiDiagnosisId} IS NOT NULL AND ai_diagnosis_id = #{aiDiagnosisId}) OR (#{aiDiagnosisId} IS NULL AND #{recordId} IS NOT NULL AND record_id = #{recordId}) )
